score_rationale: Good relevance to delivery rider profile (28yo, 6000 income, electric bike stolen). Decent specificity (34% dining ratio at 914 yuan, sleep 6.3h, 1518kcal daily). Cross-domain patterns are solid (anxiety-eating-spending triangle, March 6 stress trigger) but the temporal drift table, while structured, contains some speculative interpretations (e.g., 'false calm'). Recommendations follow a formulaic pattern seen across outputs and lack deeply personalized touches beyond surface-level adjustments.
